description: Complete a document-grounded extraction and verification task from the imported context. Source candidate intent: Ingest Ctx2Skill documents and evaluate extracted skills using evidence and graph provenance. The Skill returns a structured answer, extracted steps, evidence, and verifier notes; it does not perform self-play training, clone repositories, install packages, download datasets, or mutate local files by itself.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: Complete {task} using only {document_context}. Respect allowed_operations={allowed_operations}; describe prohibited side effects instead of executing them. Return JSON with result, evidence, and verifier. Evidence must cite the facts, procedures, constraints, or examples that justify the answer.

allowed_operations.description: Operations permitted by the document context.

document_context.description: Relevant text, facts, procedures, constraints, or examples from the imported document.

evidence.description: Context-grounded evidence used by the Judge.

result.description: Structured result produced from the document Skill.

extracted_steps.description: Procedure or decision steps extracted from the document.

verifier.description: Minimal verifier verdict, failure signal, or replay score for the result.

checked.description: Postconditions, constraints, paths, or evidence points checked.

failure_signal.description: Reason the verifier would reject the result.

passed.description: Whether the preview verifier accepts the result.

postconditions: output.evidence cites the document facts, procedures, constraints, or examples used.

preconditions: Relevant document facts, procedures, constraints, and examples have been isolated.
